errors.description: The WORM evidence manifest is missing a canonical proof bundle hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM manifest verification until proof bundle hash continuity is present

errors.description: The WORM evidence manifest is missing a canonical timestamp anchor hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM manifest verification until timestamp anchor continuity is present

errors.description: The WORM evidence manifest is missing a canonical RFC3161 preflight request digest.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM manifest verification until RFC3161 digest continuity is present

errors.description: The WORM evidence manifest is malformed or does not match canonical manifest hashing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM manifest verification until manifest structure and hashes are canonical

errors.description: The WORM evidence manifest does not include a retention policy label.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM manifest verification until retention governance is explicit

errors.description: The WORM evidence manifest contains unsafe diagnostics or redaction-sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM manifest verification until no secrets or raw approvals are present
